## Process
### Functions
- `health()`: (no docstring)
- `alert_counts()`: Aggregate badge counts · used by AlertsBadge top-bar widget.
- `async log_activity(request)`: Iter 21 · UI activity log. POST any JSON · stored in-memory.
- `async stream()`: Iter 23 · SSE stream of alert counts every 10s · push replaces polling.
- `list_activity(offset, limit, action)`: Iter 21+26 · paginated activity · §6.1 envelope · C3 closure.
- `async hitl_bulk_action(request)`: Iter 21 · bulk approve/reject HITL decisions · receipts logged.

- Return values from functions above
